description: A male vocalist sings this Rap. The tempo is slow with enthusiastic drumming, syncopated piano harmony, digital beats,keyboard arrangements with vocal backup and a catchy vocal riff. The rap is catchy, youthful, insightful, enthusiastic, intense, passionate, emotional and persuasive. This song is contemporary Rap/Hip-Hop.
accompaniment: drumming, syncopated piano harmony, digital beats, keyboard arrangements
